# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 0 symbols 1 orders 6 max_qty 1000 max_notional 1000000
cmd reg S0
cmd limit 0 1 S 100 3 GTC
evt accept 1 0 1
cmd limit 0 2 B 100 5 IOC
evt accept 2 0 2
evt trade 3 0 2 1 100 3
cmd limit 0 3 B 99 4 IOC
evt accept 4 0 3
cmd limit 0 4 S 101 5 GTC
evt accept 5 0 4
cmd limit 0 5 B 101 2 IOC
evt accept 6 0 5
evt trade 7 0 5 4 101 2
cmd market 0 6 B 1
evt accept 8 0 6
evt trade 9 0 6 4 101 1
snapshot last_seq 9 trades 3
sym 0 bid - ask 101 orders 1
level 0 A 101 2
